fire_rating.ul_design: UL D925 (or equivalent floor-ceiling assembly with steel joists)

components.name: Spandrel Beam
components.description: Perimeter beam at building edge supporting joist seats and deck edge. Receives full SFRM coverage.

properties.orientation: Top flange at deck elevation, web vertical at building perimeter

components.name: Joist Seat
components.material: Steel bearing plate — part of open-web steel joist
components.description: Joist bottom chord extension and seat angle bearing on spandrel beam top flange. Connection hardware must be fireproofed.

properties.attachment: Welded to beam top flange (field weld)
properties.coverage_note: Seat, weld, and joist bottom chord end must be encapsulated in SFRM

components.name: Deck Edge
components.description: Edge of metal deck at spandrel beam. Deck may overhang beam slightly or terminate at beam flange edge.

properties.edge_condition: Deck cut edge or factory edge at spandrel
properties.closure_note: Deck edge may require closure pour stop or edge angle

components.name: Pour Stop
components.material: Galvanized sheet metal or formed steel angle
components.description: Pour stop (edge form) at deck perimeter retaining concrete slab edge. Must be coordinated with SFRM termination.

properties.type: Sheet metal bent plate or steel angle
properties.height: Matches concrete slab thickness above deck
properties.sfrm_interface: SFRM terminates at or behind pour stop — verify no gap

components.name: SFRM Coverage — Edge Assembly
components.description: Complete SFRM encapsulation of spandrel beam, joist seat connection, and deck edge zone per UL listing requirements

properties.joist_seat_coverage: Seat, weld, and first 6 inches of joist chords
properties.deck_edge_coverage: SFRM extends to deck edge — continuous with deck underside SFRM

components.name: Edge Termination
components.material: SFRM terminated at pour stop or edge angle
components.description: Clean termination of SFRM at building edge where fireproofing meets exterior envelope or pour stop

properties.termination_method: SFRM feathered to edge or terminated against pour stop/closure angle
properties.weatherproofing_note: SFRM at exposed edges must be protected from moisture if exterior is not yet enclosed

assembly_constraints.description: Joist seat and connection hardware must be fully encapsulated in SFRM
assembly_constraints.rule: No exposed steel at joist seat, weld, or bearing plate. Extend SFRM min 6 inches onto joist chords.

assembly_constraints.description: Pour stop installation must be coordinated with SFRM application
assembly_constraints.rule: Apply SFRM to beam and joist seat before or concurrent with pour stop installation. Verify no gap behind pour stop.

assembly_constraints.description: SFRM must be continuous from deck underside through beam and joist seat to slab edge
assembly_constraints.rule: No interruption in fire-rated envelope at building perimeter edge

assembly_constraints.description: SFRM at exposed perimeter edges is vulnerable to weather damage before building is enclosed
assembly_constraints.rule: Protect exposed SFRM from rain, wind, and freezing until exterior envelope is installed
